problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: If Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus is applied to instability, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
